title: baissea subrufa
intro: Baissea subrufa, also known as the yellow-flowered Baissea, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Baissea subrufa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Baissea subrufa is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
